name: Fish with Rice Wine
recipeIngredient: 1/2 bunch scallions, trimmed and chopped fine on the diagonal
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge fish in whole wheat flour.
2. Mix about two-thirds vegetable oil with one-third sesame oil.
3. Heat enough oil mixture to coat the bottom of a large skillet (cooking all the fish at once may require more than one skillet).
4. Add fish (do not crowd) and cook on both sides until done (about 5 minutes total).
5. Remove the fish to serving platter or plates and keep warm.
6. To the skillet, add rice wine and lemon juice, ginger, pepper, and pine nuts; reduce until no longer runny.
7. Pour over the fish.
8. Garnish with minced or slivered scallions.
Serves 4 to 6.
